title: Bloomberg This Weekend 04/25/2026
summary: The news doesn’t stop when markets close. Hosts David Gura, Christina Ruffini and Lisa Mateo bring clarity, context and a bit of humor to the weekend’s biggest headlines, LIVE from New York. Joined by “Muskism: A Guide for the Perplexed” Co-Authors Ben Tarnoff and Quinn Slobodian, Former US Fifth Fleet Commander for the US Navy Vice Admiral Kevin Donegan , S&P Global Vice Chairman Daniel Yergin, Representative Michael McCaul, Jetr Global Sports + Entertainment Vice President David Francis and Jetr Global Sports + Entertainment Founder and CEO Travis Murphy. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: EU Leaders Convene in Cyprus Amid Iran War
title_cn: 伊朗战争期间欧盟领导人齐聚塞浦路斯
summary: European countries need to step up strategically in the Middle East, strike deals with partners across the region and try to bring an end to the Iran war, Cyprus’ foreign minister said Friday. Bloomberg News Chief Europe Correspondent Oliver Crook joins David Gura and Christina Ruffini on Bloomberg This Weekend to discuss. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Billion-Barrel Hormuz Oil Shock Is About to Crash Demand
title_cn: 十亿桶霍尔木兹石油危机即将导致需求崩溃
summary: The Strait of Hormuz oil shock has yet to crash demand as the rich world borrows from its stocks and pays up to secure supply. Traders are now sounding the alarm that a harsh adjustment is coming. Bloomberg News Washington Bureau Chief Peggy Collins and White House Correspondent Jeff Mason join David Gura and Christina Ruffini on Bloomberg This Weekend for a wide-ranging conversation on the latest in politics. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: BTW | FIFA World Cup, Chili, Pokémon
title_cn: 顺便说一句| FIFA世界杯，辣椒，神奇宝贝
summary: Bloomberg This Weekend = BTW = By The Way: Lisa Mateo, Christina Ruffini and David Gura dive into the headlines you may have missed on Bloomberg This Weekend. Watch more here: Watch the show LIVE every Saturday and Sunday morning. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Triumphal Arch: How Trump is Leaving His Mark on DC
title_cn: 凯旋门：特朗普如何在华盛顿留下自己的印记
summary: Twice the size of the Lincoln Memorial, taller than almost all structures in Washington DC, and the winged figure atop rising some 60 feet high, the equivalent of a six-story building: President Donald Trump’s proposed “Triumphal Arch.” Bloomberg CityLab writer Kriston Capps joins Christina Ruffini in Washington DC to discuss the impact Trump is having on the architecture of the nation's capital. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Rep. McCaul: US-Iran Talks Unlikely to Reach Breakthrough
title_cn: 众议员麦考尔：美伊谈判不太可能取得突破
summary: Rep. Michael McCaul (R-TX) joins David Gura and Christina Ruffini on Bloomberg This Weekend to discuss the US-Iranian talks that were meant to end the conflict that has closed the Strait of Hormuz.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Pointed News Quiz | Insurance, Crypto, Media
title_cn: 针对性新闻测验 |保险、加密货币、媒体
summary: Bloomberg News White House Correspondent Jeff Mason joins David Gura, Christina Ruffini, and Lisa Mateo on “Bloomberg This Weekend” to play Pointed! Wager your points, leverage your bets and answer wisely. A new quiz is available to play each week on Bloomberg.com (Source: Bloomberg)

title: The Diplomacy Behind the World Cup
title_cn: 世界杯背后的外交
summary: The Trump administration said it’s expediting visa appointments for foreign fans with tickets to the 2026 FIFA World Cup. This move is aimed at smoothing travel for the world’s most watched sporting event, even as the White House tightens immigration rules. Jetr Global Sports + Entertainment Founder and CEO Travis Murphy and Vice President of Global Growth Strategy + Government Affairs David Francis join David Gura and Christina Ruffini on Bloomberg This Weekend to discuss. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Inside the Rise of BYD, China’s Top EV Maker
title_cn: 中国顶级电动汽车制造商比亚迪的崛起
summary: In just a few years China has become the world’s largest car exporter, and electric vehicle-maker BYD is leading the way; it’s now the top-selling EV producer globally, overtaking Tesla and expanding into Europe and beyond. Bloomberg’s Tom Mackenzie reports from Paris, where BYD unveiled its latest luxury EV: the Denza Z9GT. He speaks with BYD Group Executive Vice President Stella Li and Alfredo Altavilla, BYD’s Special Adviser for Europe, about the company’s rapid rise, its technological edge,

title: The Billion-Barrel Hormuz Oil Shock Is About to Crash Demand
title_cn: 十亿桶霍尔木兹石油危机即将导致需求崩溃
summary: The Strait of Hormuz oil shock has yet to crash demand as the rich world borrows from its stocks and pays up to secure supply. Traders are now sounding the alarm that a harsh adjustment is coming.

title: Hormuz Crisis Is ‘Biggest Energy Disruption Ever,’ Yergin Says
title_cn: 耶金表示，霍尔木兹危机是“有史以来最大的能源中断”
summary: S&P Global Vice Chairman Daniel Yergin warned that the Strait of Hormuz crisis represents “the biggest energy disruption we’ve ever seen,” despite oil prices not yet reaching the inflation-adjusted equivalent of previous highs.

title: S&P's Yergin: "The Biggest Energy Disruption We've Ever Seen"
title_cn: 标准普尔的耶金：“我们见过的最大的能源破坏”
summary: The Strait of Hormuz oil shock has yet to crash demand as the rich world borrows from its stocks and pays up to secure supply. Traders are now sounding the alarm that a harsh adjustment is coming. S&P Global Vice Chairman Daniel Yergin joins David Gura and Christina Ruffini on Bloomberg This Weekend to discuss. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: ‘He Has the Market in a Chokehold’: Stocks Swing as Trump Posts
title_cn: “他扼杀了市场”：股市随着特朗普的言论而波动
summary: There are lots of things that can move the stock market, from economic data, to Federal Reserve pronouncements, to corporate developments. But for the past 15 months, traders’ fortunes have been largely tethered to the whims of a single person: President Donald Trump.

title: Blockade Standoff Keeps Traffic in Strait of Hormuz Near Zero
title_cn: 封锁对峙使霍尔木兹海峡的交通量接近于零
summary: Iran has played down expectations of direct talks with the United States over ending the war as US envoys are expected to travel to Islamabad, Pakistan — but this time without Vice President JD Vance, the lead negotiator. US Navy Retired Vice Adm. Kevin Donegan joins David Gura and Christina Ruffini on Bloomberg This Weekend to discuss. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Decoding Muskism: Beyond the Billionaire
title_cn: 解码马斯克主义：超越亿万富翁
summary: The world's richest man may soon also be the world's first trillionaire as Elon Musk's SpaceX targets an IPO with a valuation of around $1.5 Trillion in what would be the largest IPO ever. Muskism: A Guide for the Perplexed authors Ben Tarnoff and Quinn Slobodian join David Gura and Christina Ruffini on Bloomberg This Weekend to discuss "Muskism," referring to the ideology and worldview that shaped Musk. They say it is "an operating system for the 21st century." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: DOJ Drops Powell Probe, Smoothing Path for Kevin Warsh
title_cn: 美国司法部放弃鲍威尔调查，为凯文·沃什铺平道路
summary: The Justice Department said it would end its criminal investigation of Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell, an attempt to clear the obstacle that has stalled Kevin Warsh's confirmation as his possible successor. Bloomberg News Justice Department Reporter Chris Strohm and Reporter Enda Curran join David Gura and Christina Ruffini on Bloomberg This Weekend to discuss. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Bitcoin’s Stealth Rally Has Traders Setting Sights on $80,000
title_cn: 比特币悄然上涨，交易员将目光瞄准 80,000 美元
summary: Bitcoin is approaching $80,000 for the first time since January — a stealth recovery built not on euphoria but on short covering and the relentless accumulation by one company: Strategy Inc.

title: White House Sends Team to Pakistan as Iran Balks at Talks
title_cn: 伊朗在谈判中犹豫不决，白宫派遣团队前往巴基斯坦
summary: President Donald Trump has sent envoys to Pakistan with the intention of meeting with Iranian officials, while Tehran sounded a pessimistic tone on the prospects for talks to end the eight-week war roiling the global economy. Bloomberg News Deputy UAE Bureau Chief Abeer Abu Omar, Washington Correspondent Josh Wingrove and Senior Reporter Dan Strumpf join David Gura and Christina Ruffini on Bloomberg This Weekend to discuss. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: What the Fed Can Do About Anthropic’s Latest System
title_cn: 美联储可以对 Anthropic 的最新系统做些什么
summary: Anthropic says its newest AI system can detect serious cybersecurity risks, but the new technology is so powerful that the company is holding back public release. The nearly autonomous system can detect banking software vulnerabilities and spawn sub-agents that operate without human oversight at unprecedented speed. Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent and Fed Chair Jay Powell took the unusual step of calling in major bank leaders to discuss the risks raised by the new model. Experts weigh in on whether regulation and open-source tools can keep the financial system safe. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: World’s Oldest Financial Institutions Facing New Levels of Risk
title_cn: 世界上最古老的金融机构面临新的风险水平
summary: The IMF is more important than ever in times of crisis

title: Strait of Hormuz Remains Near-Empty With Just a Few Iran Ships Moving
title_cn: 霍尔木兹海峡几乎空无一人，只有几艘伊朗船只在航行
summary: The Strait of Hormuz remains largely empty of merchant ships, with only a few Tehran-linked vessels moving through the waterway, following a tense week that saw Iranian gunboat attacks and tanker interceptions by the US Navy.

title: Malaysia Picks a Former Judge to Lead Its Anti-Graft Agency
title_cn: 马来西亚任命前法官领导反腐败机构
summary: Malaysia named Abdul Halim Aman as the next anti-graft chief, taking over from embattled head Azam Baki when his term ends next month.

title: Finland Gets Debt Warning as S&P Outlook Turns Negative
title_cn: 标准普尔展望转为负面，芬兰收到债务警告
summary: S&P Global Ratings cut the outlook on Finland’s debt to negative from stable, as the Nordic nation’s debt pile keeps growing.

title: China Warns of Heavy Rain, Flood Risks Ahead of May Day Holiday
title_cn: “五一”假期前夕，中国发布暴雨、洪水风险预警
summary: Chinese weather authorities warned of heavy rainfall across southern regions from April 26 to April 29, with downpours expected to hit areas already saturated by earlier storms, raising the risk of flooding and landslides.

title: Thousands Protest Against Outgoing Malaysian Anti-Graft Chief
title_cn: 数千人抗议即将离任的马来西亚反腐败负责人
summary: Thousands of Malaysians gathered in Kuala Lumpur on Saturday, reiterating calls for the establishment of a Royal Commission of Inquiry into allegations involving outgoing anti-graft chief Azam Baki.

title: The Stock Picking Philosophy to Find the Next Amazon: Masters in Business
title_cn: 寻找下一个亚马逊的选股哲学：商业硕士
summary: Barry speaks with David Gardner, Author and Co-Founder, at the Motley Fool. They discuss David's new book book "Rule Breaker Investing: How to Pick the Best Stocks of he Future and Build Lasting Wealth." They also discuss the pros and cons of different investing strategies and trends. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Russian Attack on Ukrainian Cities Kills Four People, Zelenskiy Says
title_cn: 泽连斯基称，俄罗斯对乌克兰城市的袭击造成四人死亡
summary: Russia carried out one of the largest attacks on Ukraine overnight, killing four people and leaving over 30 wounded across the country, Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskiy said on Telegram.

title: Understanding the Most Viral Chart in Artificial Intelligence | Odd Lots
title_cn: 了解人工智能中最热门的图表 |零股
summary:
METR, which stands for Model Evaluation and Threat Researc, is focused on understanding the degree to which AI models can engage in autonomous, complex tasks. METR see this is as a particularly important benchmark, given the risk that AI could one day be engaged in recursive self improvement, taking humans out of the loop. But how do you really gauge a model's ability to do complex problems. And what is being measured for exactly? On this episode we speak with METR's President Chris Painter as well as Joel Becker, a member of the technical staff who works on evaluation methods for the organization. We discuss both the mechanics and the philosophy of METR's work, and what it means when we see a a chart showing that Clause Opus 4.6 can do a task that would take a human nearly 12 hours.
 (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Graticule’s Levinson ‘Open’ to Iran Resolution Ahead of Rally
title_cn: Graticule 的莱文森在集会前对伊朗决议持“开放”态度
summary: Investor Adam Levinson said he remains bullish despite recent market volatility, and is buying the dip ahead of an expected rally on a resolution in the Iran conflict.

title: PBOC Warns of Finance ‘Involution,’ Reaffirms Risk Control Focus
title_cn: 中国人民银行警告金融“内卷化”，重申风险控制重点
summary: China’s central bank and foreign‑exchange regulator reiterated the need to curb excessive — or “involution‑style” — competition within the country’s finance industry, framing it as a governance and discipline concern.

title: China Says US Export Bills Risk Disrupting Chip Supply Chains
title_cn: 中国称美国出口票据有扰乱芯片供应链的风险
summary: China said it is closely monitoring US legislative plans after the House Foreign Affairs Committee advanced export-control bills targeting semiconductors, which Beijing warned could disrupt global supply chains if passed.

title: Denso to Withdraw Proposal to Take Over Rohm, Nikkei Says
title_cn: 日经称电装将撤回收购罗姆的提议
summary: Denso Corp. is set to withdraw its proposal to take over semiconductor maker Rohm Co., as the two sides were unable to see eye to eye on an offer, Nikkei reported.

title: Oracle Data Center $16 Billion Financing Gets Over The Line
title_cn: Oracle数据中心160亿美元融资完成
summary: A $16 billion financing for a giant Oracle Corp. data center in Michigan has wrapped after months of stop-and-start negotiations with investors.

title: AI Chip Surge Elevates Taiwan, Korea in Global Equity Rankings
title_cn: AI芯片热潮提升台湾、韩国全球股市排名
summary: The artificial intelligence boom has triggered a seismic reshuffling of global equity markets, with Taiwan and South Korea muscling past European nations one by one.

title: Wall Street Week | Anthropic Cybersecurity Risk, BYD Goes Global, The Billionaire Next Door
title_cn: 华尔街周刊 |人为网络安全风险，比亚迪走向全球，邻家亿万富翁
summary: This week, regulators and banks are scrambling to catch up after the debut of Anthropic’s nearly autonomous system that can find cybersecurity vulnerabilities on its own. And, the electric vehicle company that started as a battery manufacturer is giving European automakers and Tesla a run for their money. Plus, the IMF was built for a very different world. Can it adapt to meet a globally connected economy that is being tested by war? Later, pipelines, portable sinks, and dental offices are creating more wealth than Wall Street wants to admit. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: USA Rare Earth CEO on 'Transformative' $2.8B Serra Verde Deal
title_cn: 美国稀土首席执行官谈“变革性”$2.8B Serra Verde 交易
summary: USA Rare Earth recently announced a $2.8 billion acquisition of Brazil’s Serra Verde Group, which is expected to close in the third quarter. It comes as comes as the US and its allies scramble to secure alternative supplies of rare-earth elements, a market long dominated by China. The minerals are used in high-strength magnets employed in consumer electronics, cars and defense systems. Barbara Humpton, CEO of USA Rare Earth, joins Bloomberg Businessweek Daily to discuss, calling the deal "transformative," adding that it will make USA Rare Earth "the global leader" in the space. Humpton speaks with Carol Massar and Tim Stenovec. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Maine Governor Mills Vetoes Statewide Data Center Moratorium
title_cn: 缅因州州长米尔斯否决全州数据中心暂停令
summary: Maine Governor Janet Mills vetoed what would have been the first statewide freeze on large data center development, saying it would hurt a part of Maine in need of an economic boost.

title: Private Credit BDCs’ 2028 Maturity Wall Poses Risk: Moody's
title_cn: 穆迪：私人信贷 BDC 的 2028 年到期墙构成风险
summary: Marc Pinto, global head of private credit at Moody's Ratings, joins Scarlet Fu and Olivia Fishlow on "Bloomberg Real Yield." Private credit funds with outsized exposure to software and tech loans face rising refinancing and credit risks as a wave of debt maturities loom from 2028, according to Moody’s Ratings. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US Government Stake in Intel Has Jumped 300% to $36 Billion
title_cn: 美国政府在英特尔的股份猛增 300% 至 360 亿美元
summary: The value of the US government stake in Intel Corp. has increased fourfold to hit a value of about $36 billion after the chipmaker’s financial outlook showed a resurgence in sales.

title: Why Apple Picked Their Product Guy as the Next CEO
title_cn: 为什么苹果选择他们的产品专家作为下一任首席执行官
summary: At Apple, 15 years of Tim Cook is coming to an end. What will 15 years under John Ternus look like?

title: BDCs Have 'Taken a Licking, Keep on Ticking': Moody's
title_cn: BDC 已“受挫，继续前进”：穆迪
summary: Marc Pinto, global head of private credit at Moody's Ratings, joins Scarlet Fu and Olivia Fishlow on "Bloomberg Real Yield." Private credit funds with outsized exposure to software and tech loans face rising refinancing and credit risks as a wave of debt maturities loom from 2028, according to Moody’s Ratings. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Intel Shares Eclipse Dot-Com Peak After Blockbuster Forecast
title_cn: 英特尔分享了在重磅炸弹预测后Eclipse Dot-Com峰值
summary: Intel Corp. shares hit a record high after the chipmaker delivered a sales forecast that shattered Wall Street expectations, showing that it’s finally benefiting from a boom in AI spending.

title: Amazon-Backed X-Energy Climbs 27% After $1.02 Billion US IPO
title_cn: 亚马逊支持的 X-Energy 在美国首次公开募股 10.2 亿美元后股价上涨 27%
summary: X-Energy Inc. shares closed 27% above their IPO price, after the nuclear energy firm raised $1.02 billion in an upsized US initial public offering.

title: Nvidia Breakout Sends Chip Giant to First Record Since October
title_cn: Nvidia突破让芯片巨头创下10月份以来的首个记录
summary: Nvidia Corp. shares rose to their first record in months on Friday, the latest example of improving momentum at the leader in artificial intelligence chips.

title: DeepSeek’s Long-Awaited New Model Fails to Narrow US Lead in AI
title_cn: DeepSeek 期待已久的新模型未能缩小美国在人工智能领域的领先优势
summary: When China’s DeepSeek released a competitive new artificial intelligence model called R1 last January purportedly built for less than many rivals, some feared the achievement posed a threat to America’s lead in artificial intelligence.

title: Stanford Professor Targets $1 Billion Valuation For AI-for-Physiology Startup
title_cn: 斯坦福大学教授为生理学人工智能初创公司估值 10 亿美元
summary: Stanford University professor James Zou is raising money at a roughly $1 billion valuation to build artificial intelligence models to improve research about the human body, according to sources familiar with the efforts.

title: Intel Delivers Strong AI-Fueled Outlook | Bloomberg Tech 4/24/2026
title_cn: 英特尔发布人工智能驱动的强劲前景 |彭博科技 2026 年 4 月 24 日
summary: Bloomberg’s Ed Ludlow discusses his conversation with Intel CEO Lip Bu Tan following the company’s strong earnings that sent its stock blasting past its dot-com era peak. Plus, Google plans to invest up to $40 billion into rival Anthropic. And tech job cuts ramp up, with Meta and Microsoft planning layoffs or announcing buyouts as AI spending surges.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Defense Tech Startups See Opportunity in Ongoing Conflicts
title_cn: 国防科技初创公司在持续冲突中看到了机遇
summary: The wars in Ukraine and Iran have underscored the growing importance of autonomous air and sea vehicles. Erin Price-Wright, general partner at Andreessen Horowitz, says the conflicts have also been wake-up calls for defense procurement, driving interest in startups building those crafts. She joins Ed Ludlow on “Bloomberg Tech.” (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Amazon-Backed Nuclear Firm X-Energy Raises $1.02 Billion in IPO
title_cn: 亚马逊支持的核电公司 X-Energy 通过 IPO 筹集 10.2 亿美元
summary: Amazon-backed, nuclear energy firm X-Energy raised $1.02 billion in an upsized initial public offering, the latest sign of renewed enthusiasm for the IPO market. X-Energy CEO J. Clay Sell joins Ed Ludlow on “Bloomberg Tech.” (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Meta, Microsoft Cuts Could Hit 23,000 Jobs
title_cn: Meta、微软可能裁员 23,000 人
summary: Meta and Microsoft are planning layoffs or announcing buyouts that could affect as many as 23,000 jobs as they pivot spending to artificial intelligence. Bloomberg’s Brody Ford and Riley Griffin join Ed Ludlow on “Bloomberg Tech” to break down the wider impact the cuts could have on the tech workforce.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Data Centers Are Finding a Surprising Way to Deploy Batteries
title_cn: 数据中心正在寻找一种令人惊讶的电池部署方式
summary: By pairing energy storage with natural gas, hyperscalers are able to get power faster and do so behind the meter.

title: Kushner’s Thrive Widens Bets With Investment in MLB’s Giants
title_cn: 库什纳的繁荣扩大了对美国职业棒球大联盟巨人队的投资
summary: Thrive, the brand behind Joshua Kushner’s venture megafirm Thrive Capital, has launched a new company to invest in iconic names — with its first bet targeting a Major League Baseball team.

title: SpaceX, Anduril Among Companies to Win Golden Dome Contracts
title_cn: SpaceX、Anduril 等公司将赢得金顶合同
summary: The US Space Force awarded 12 companies, including Lockheed Martin Corp. and SpaceX, contracts worth up to $3.2 billion to develop prototypes for space-based interceptors under President Donald Trump’s Golden Dome plan.

title: Some Of This Year’s Best Video Games Find Joy In Losing
title_cn: 今年一些最好的视频游戏在失败中找到乐趣
summary: Games like Saros and Titanium Court show the appeal of meaningful death

title: DOJ Joins Musk’s xAI Suit Against Colorado AI Discrimination Law
title_cn: 美国司法部加入马斯克针对科罗拉多州人工智能歧视法的 xAI 诉讼
summary: The Trump administration is joining Elon Musk’s artificial intelligence company xAI in its legal challenge to Colorado’s new state law that seeks to prevent discrimination by autonomous tools in employment and other areas.

title: The Hottest Phone for Kids Right Now Is a $100 Landline
title_cn: 目前最热门的儿童手机是 100 美元的固定电话
summary: The Tin Can has gone viral over the past year, mostly through word of mouth. Now schools want to get even more of them in students' homes.

title: Hungary’s Next Premier Warns Investors to Shun Orban-Tied Assets
title_cn: 匈牙利下一任总理警告投资者避开与欧尔班挂钩的资产
summary: Incoming Hungarian Prime Minister Peter Magyar said he had information that wealthy figures linked to Viktor Orban’s outgoing government were moving assets abroad and called on authorities to detain fleeing “oligarch” families.

title: Trump Scraps US Trip for Iran Talks, Leaving Ceasefire in Limbo
title_cn: 特朗普取消美国之行并进行伊朗会谈，停火陷入困境
summary: President Donald Trump canceled a planned trip to Pakistan by his top envoys for negotiations over the Iran conflict, raising questions about the durability of the current ceasefire.

title: DOJ’s Partial Reversal on Powell Probe Keeps Fed Drama Alive
title_cn: 司法部对鲍威尔调查的部分逆转让美联储的戏剧性继续下去
summary: A decision by US District Attorney Jeanine Pirro to drop a criminal probe into the Federal Reserve potentially clears a path for President Donald Trump’s nominee to take over the central bank. What it won’t do is secure the current Fed chair’s departure.

title: US-Iran Talks Unlikely to Advance Quickly, GOP Lawmaker Says
title_cn: 共和党议员表示，美伊谈判不太可能迅速取得进展
summary: US-Iranian talks on ending the conflict that has closed the Strait of Hormuz seem unlikely to make major progress soon, a Republican lawmaker said.

title: China’s Wang Yi Discusses Reopening Border Trade With Myanmar
title_cn: 中国王毅讨论与缅甸重新开放边境贸易
summary: China and Myanmar discussed the resumption of border trade and cooperation in energy and mining during a visit to Naypyidaw on Saturday by Chinese Foreign Minister Wang Yi, according to a statement by the office of Myanmar President Min Aung Hlaing.

title: Militants Strike Mali Capital as Army Fights Broad Offensive
title_cn: 武装分子袭击马里首都，军队发动广泛攻势
summary: Mali’s army said on Saturday it was battling coordinated armed attacks on military barracks in Bamako and several locations across the country, indicating a broader, multi-city offensive.

title: Defeated Orban Says He Won’t Take Up Seat, Wants to Lead Renewal
title_cn: 落选欧尔班表示不会就任，希望领导续约
summary: Hungary’s outgoing Prime Minister Viktor Orban said he won’t take up his seat in parliament following his party’s landslide defeat in this month’s election but wants to stay on as Fidesz’s leader to lead a process of “renewal.”

title: Iran’s Araghchi Left Pakistan Meeting With US Talks in Limbo
title_cn: 伊朗阿拉格奇离开巴基斯坦与美国的会谈
summary: Iran’s top diplomat met mediators in Pakistan but left Islamabad ahead of the expected arrival of US envoys as prospects for direct negotiations to end the eight-week war remain slim.

title: Mexico Says Dead US Agents Had No Permission to Raid Drug Lab
title_cn: 墨西哥称死去的美国特工没有获得突袭药物实验室的许可
summary: Two US agents who died after an operation to dismantle a suspected Mexican narcotics laboratory had no permission to be carrying out operations of this kind, according to the nation’s security cabinet.

title: Germany Readies Naval Units for Possible Hormuz Mission
title_cn: 德国为可能的霍尔木兹任务做好海军部队准备
summary: Germany is sending naval units to the Mediterranean in preparation for possible deployment in an international mission in the Strait of Hormuz.

title: Trump’s War, Redistricting Setbacks Fan Republican Midterm Angst
title_cn: 特朗普的战争、选区重划的挫折加剧了共和党中期选举的焦虑
summary: For Republicans, this was the week midterm anxiety went from a smolder to a wildfire.

title: France and Greece Renew Defense Pact Deepening Military Ties
title_cn: 法国和希腊续签防务协定深化军事关系
summary: France and Greece renewed their defense pact, shoring up their alliance at a time when European nations seek to further boost their deterrence strategy.

title: London’s Housebuilding Crisis Weighs on Labour’s Election Pitch
title_cn: 伦敦房屋建设危机给工党的选举带来压力
summary: “If I am elected mayor, my single biggest priority will be to build thousands more homes every year,” Sadiq Khan wrote in his 2016 election manifesto to run the UK capital.

title: Taiwan Fears It’ll Be ‘On the Menu’ at Trump-Xi Summit
title_cn: 台湾担心它会成为特习峰会的“菜单”
summary: A senior Taiwanese official expressed concern that President Donald Trump might make concessions on the self-governed island in his meeting with Chinese President Xi Jinping, adding Taiwan was working hard to prevent such a scenario.

title: Merz’s Big Year of Economic Renewal in Germany Is Going Awry
title_cn: 默茨德国经济复兴的重要一年出现问题
summary: Chancellor Friedrich Merz’s bid for a meaningful rebound in 2026 is getting harder to deliver by the week, despite the huge stimulus flowing into Europe’s biggest economy.

title: Starmer’s Rivals Need Everything to Go Wrong for Him All at Once
title_cn: 斯塔默的竞争对手需要他的一切都同时出问题
summary: Keir Starmer’s rivals in Britain’s governing Labour Party have long had a motive for deposing their unpopular prime minister. The next few weeks may grant them the opportunity.

title: Iran War Fallout Drives Inflation Risks in Africa | Bloomberg Next Africa
title_cn: 伊朗战争余波加剧非洲通胀风险彭博下一个非洲
summary: On this episode of Next Africa, we track how the fallout from the Iran war is rippling through global supply chains, pushing up costs and raising concerns over food prices across the continent. Bloomberg's Jennifer Zabasajja speaks to UN Deputy Secretary-General Amina J. Mohammed on the growing strain on Africa's food systems and the impact on food security. Plus, we head to South Africa’s Karoo, where a harsh desert landscape is being transformed into a potential pistachio hub.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US Sanctions Giant Chinese Refiner Hengli Over Iran Links
title_cn: 美国因伊朗关联制裁中国炼油巨头恒力
summary: The US sanctioned one of China’s largest private oil refiners over its links to Iran, a move that ramps up economic pressure on Tehran but also risks irking Beijing just weeks ahead of an expected leaders’ summit.

title: Trump Reports Flurry of March Bond Purchases in New Disclosure
title_cn: 特朗普在新披露中称三月份债券购买热潮
summary: President Donald Trump reported dozens of bond purchases and sales in March totaling millions of dollars, according to a financial disclosure.

title: Trump’s $10 Billion IRS Suit Hits Snag With Skeptical Judge
title_cn: 特朗普 100 亿美元的国税局诉讼遭遇法官怀疑
summary: A judge questioned whether President Donald Trump’s $10 billion lawsuit against the Internal Revenue Service and the US Treasury can proceed with Trump effectively in control of both sides of the litigation.

title: Iran Says No Meeting Planned With US | Balance of Power: Late Edition 04/24/2026
title_cn: 伊朗表示没有计划与美国会面权力平衡：最新版 04/24/2026
summary: "Balance of Power: Late Edition" focuses on the intersection of politics and global business. On today's show, US Representative French Hill (R-AR) and US Representative Glenn Ivey (D-MD) discuss the Department of Justice's decision to drop the criminal investigation into the Federal Reserve's building costs. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Venezuela, US in Talks to Bring Opposition Onto Central Bank Board
title_cn: 委内瑞拉与美国就将反对派带入央行董事会进行谈判
summary: Venezuela and US officials are in talks to incorporate political opposition and independent members to the board of the South American country’s central bank, a key potential step toward power-sharing to help root out corruption.

title: Stocks At All-Time Highs, Powell Probe Reversal | Bloomberg Businessweek Daily 4/24/2026
title_cn: 鲍威尔探针逆转，股市创历史新高彭博商业周刊日报 2026 年 4 月 24 日
summary: On today's episode of Bloomberg Businessweek Daily, Carol Massar and Tim Stenovec discuss ongoing market reaction to potential US-Iran talks, and the DOJ's partial reversal of a criminal probe into the Federal Reserve. Bloomberg News International Economics & Policy Correspondent Mike McKee joins to discuss. Then, Grindr CEO George Arison discusses the company's inaugural White House Correspondents' Dinner party and its ongoing political initiatives. Plus, Bloomberg Businessweek National Correspondent Josh Green joins to discuss his piece on Kentucky Representative Thomas Massie. Finally, 'Bloomberg This Weekend' host David Gura joins to discuss the latest on Iran talks.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump Adviser, Fundraiser Snag Board Seats at Truth Social Firm
title_cn: 特朗普顾问、筹款人获得真相社会公司董事会席位
summary: A longtime adviser to President Donald Trump and a fundraiser involved in soliciting donations for his White House ballroom were named to the board of his social media company.

title: A Frivolous Investigation: Rep. Ivey on DOJ Drops Powell Probe
title_cn: 一项无聊的调查：众议员艾维关于司法部放弃鲍威尔调查
summary: Rep. Glenn Ivey (D-MD) shares his reaction to the Department of Justice’s decision to drop their investigation into Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell. He sees the news as a victory, but criticizes President Trump's use of power by calling the investigation “frivolous,” and suggesting it shouldn’t have started in the first place. Rep. Ivey also talks about speaking with Commerce Secretary Lutnick on tariff refunds and next steps. He speaks with Kailey Leinz and Joe Mathieu on the late edition of Bloomberg’s “Balance of Power.” (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US Considers Using Defense Production Act for Spirit Bailout
title_cn: 美国考虑利用《国防生产法》进行精神救助
summary: The Trump administration is weighing whether to invoke the Defense Production Act to support a potential bailout of Spirit Aviation Holdings Inc. according to a person familiar with the matter who requested anonymity because the talks are private.

title: Trump Opponents Push to Block Mail Voting Curbs Before Midterms
title_cn: 特朗普反对者推动在中期选举前阻止邮寄投票限制
summary: State officials, the Democratic Party and voting rights groups are racing against the calender to try to halt President Donald Trump’s latest effort to restrict voting by mail ahead of the midterm elections in November.

title: DOJ Drops Fed Probe, Clearing Way for Warsh | Balance of Power: Early Edition 4/24/2026
title_cn: 美国司法部放弃美联储调查，为沃什扫清道路权力平衡：早期版本 2026 年 4 月 24 日
summary: On the early edition of Balance of Power,  Bloomberg Washington Correspondents Joe Mathieu and Kailey Leinz discuss the DOJ's decision to drop its investigation into the Federal Reserve in order to clear a path forward for fed chair nominee Kevin Warsh. On today's show, Democrat Congresswoman from Washington and chairwoman of the Democratic Congressional Campaign Committee Suzan DelBene, Principal of the International Practice at BGR Group Lester Munson,  Managing Partner at Bully Pulpit International Adam Hodge, and Israel's former ambassador to the United States Michael Herzog. (Source: Bloomberg)
